ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Knight of the Order of the Star|Senator of Messina
ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, pp. 260-261 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
